my-java-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
my-java-project/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 1.8.

my-java-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation.
my-java-project/pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 features correctly.

my-java-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace explicit source/target configuration with the 'release' flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
my-java-project/pom.xml.why_exists: Using 'release' is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures consistent toolchain usage for Java 21.
